title: erigeron arcticus
intro: Erigeron arcticus, also known as polar fleabane or Arctic fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Arctic tundra. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Erigeron arcticus has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off bacteria and viruses, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
